ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle class */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drivetrain type */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "fuel_barrels_per_year" REAL /* Fuel barrels used per year */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "combined_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "co2_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "fuel_cost_per_year" INTEGER /* Annual fuel cost in USD */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "avg_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel) */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "range_city" REAL /* Range in city miles */,
  "range_highway" REAL /* Range in highway miles */,
  "-range_combined" REAL /* Range in combined miles */,
  "annual_fuel_cost_city" REAL /* Annual fuel cost in city in USD */,
  "annual_fuel_cost_highway" REAL /* Annual fuel cost in highway in USD */,
  "annual_fuel_cost_combined" REAL /* Annual fuel cost in combined in USD */,
  "total_lifetime_co2_emissions" REAL /* Total lifetime CO2 emissions in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drivetrain_id FOREIGN KEY ("drivetrain_id") REFERENCES drivetrains ("drivetrain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_maker_id FOREIGN KEY ("maker_id") REFERENCES makers ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class (e.g., Special Purpose Vehicle 2WD, Midsize Cars) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type (e.g., Automatic 3-spd, Manual 4-spd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "number_of_speeds" INTEGER /* Number of speeds in the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivetrains" (
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetrain type */,
  "drivetrain_name" TEXT /* Name of the drivetrain type (e.g., 2-Wheel Drive, Rear-Wheel Drive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drivetrain type */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Regular, Premium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in BTU/gal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makers" (
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "maker_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer (e.g., AM General, ASC Incorporated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., DJ Po Vehicle 2WD, GNX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of model production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of model production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_maker_id FOREIGN KEY ("maker_id") REFERENCES makers ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission standard (e.g., EPA 2020, CARB 2025) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the standard became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the standard will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_emissions" (
  "vehicle_emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission standard */,
  "co2_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "fuel_barrels_per_year" REAL /* Fuel barrels used per year */,
  "fuel_cost_per_year" INTEGER /* Annual fuel cost in USD */,
  "emission_rating" TEXT /* Emission rating (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_emissions_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES emission_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "combined_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "avg_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "fuel_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency rating (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, compliance officer, sales manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access (e.g., fields viewed, changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the vehicle data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being recalled */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date the recall was issued */,
  "recall_description" TEXT /* Description of the recall */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
